functional_requirements.title: Record Grade
functional_requirements.description: Teacher records a grade for a student in a course. Validates student existence, course existence, score range (0-100), and prevents duplicate grade records.

functional_requirements.title: Update Grade
functional_requirements.description: Teacher updates an existing grade record. Validates grade record existence and updates score and recorded_at timestamp.

functional_requirements.title: Delete Grade
functional_requirements.description: Teacher deletes a grade record. Validates grade record existence and removes it.

functional_requirements.title: Get Student Grades
functional_requirements.description: Retrieve all grades for a student, compute average, total credits, and GPA. Display grades with course name and letter grade.

functional_requirements.title: Get Course Grades
functional_requirements.description: Retrieve all grades for a course, compute average, max, min, and distribution of letter grades.

functional_requirements.title: List Grades by Class
functional_requirements.description: List grades for a class, optionally filtered by course. Compute class average and rank students by score.

functional_requirements.title: Get Grade Report
functional_requirements.description: Generate a text report for a student including all subject grades, average, GPA, and total credits.

functional_requirements.title: Get Course Statistics
functional_requirements.description: Compute statistics for a course: average, standard deviation, pass rate, and grade distribution percentages.

functional_requirements.title: Add Student
functional_requirements.description: Add a new student with unique student_id. Validates no duplicate student_id.

functional_requirements.title: Add Course
functional_requirements.description: Add a new course with unique course_id. Validates no duplicate course_id.

non_functional_requirements.description: All operations should complete in memory without external I/O delays.
Input and output must follow the specified JSON format for consistency.

acceptance_criteria.description: Record grade: valid input creates grade record with correct grade_id and letter grade; duplicate returns error with existing grade_id.
Update grade: valid input updates score and letter grade; invalid grade_id returns error.
Delete grade: valid input removes grade record; invalid grade_id returns error.
Get student grades: returns correct grades, average, total credits, and GPA; GPA calculation uses weighted formula.
Get course grades: returns correct grades, average, max, min, and distribution counts.
List grades by class: returns students with scores and ranks, class average; optional course filter works.
Get grade report: generates text report with all required fields and correct formatting.
Get course statistics: computes average, standard deviation, pass rate, and grade distribution percentages correctly.
Add student: adds student with unique ID; duplicate ID returns error.
Add course: adds course with unique ID; duplicate ID returns error.

storage.details: Three independent in-memory data sources: students, courses, grades.

glossary.GPA: Grade Point Average, calculated as weighted average of grade points (A=4.0, B=3.0, C=2.0, D=1.0, F=0) multiplied by course credits.
glossary.grade_id: Unique identifier for a grade record.

input_spec.description: Input is a JSON object with command and grade_data fields. The command specifies the operation, and grade_data contains the necessary parameters.

schema.command: string (one of: record_grade, update_grade, delete_grade, get_student_grades, get_course_grades, list_class_grades, get_grade_report, get_course_stats, add_student, add_course)
schema.grade_data: object containing fields: student_id (int), course_id (int), score (int 0-100), grade_id (int), class (string), name (string), credit (int), teacher (string), enrollment_year (int)

output_spec.description: Output is a JSON object with success, message, and data fields. Data contains the result of the operation.

examples.message: 该学生此课程已有成绩记录
